_note: wizard-app lane — the config-driven guided create flow. The `notes` object declares `createWizard` (title -> status -> body), so 'New note' opens the library Wizard's guided-vs-blank landing instead of the plain dialog. `recordLayout:standard` + `openIn:page` -> the created record opens on a full page with deterministic testids (record-name, field-<key>). `body` is a richText field, so the guided plain-text answer is coerced to a one-paragraph Block[]. Other objects would keep the plain dialog (no createWizard).

questions.label: Write the opening paragraph
questions.placeholder: A short summary to start from

body.text: A seeded note so the list is never empty.
